results.question: How many reported Hypotheses does each paper have?
results.raw_model_output: SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?paper) AS ?count) WHERE  ?paper pgmr:has_contribution ?contribution . ?contribution a pgmrc:empirical_research_practice_contribution . ?contribution pgmr:venue_serie ?venue . ?venue rdfs:label ?venueName . ?contribution pgmr:data_analysis ?dataAnalysis . ?dataAnalysis pgmr:inferential_statistics ?inferentialStatistics . ?inferentialStatistics pgmr:hypothesis ?hypothesis . FILTER(LCASE(STR(?venueName)) = LCASE("IEEE International Requirements Engineering Conference")) FILTER(LCASE(STR(?hypothesis)) IN ("true", "yes", "1"))
results.extracted_query: SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?paper) AS ?count) WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C27001 . ?contribution orkgp:P135046 ?venue . ?venue rdfs:label ?venueName . ?contribution orkgp:P15124 ?dataAnalysis . ?dataAnalysis orkgp:P56043 ?inferentialStatistics . ?inferentialStatistics orkgp:P30001 ?hypothesis . FILTER(LCASE(STR(?venueName)) = LCASE("IEEE International Requirements Engineering Conference")) FILTER(LCASE(STR(?hypothesis)) IN ("true", "yes", "1")) }
results.pgmr_postprocessed_query: SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?paper) AS ?count) WHERE { ?paper pgmr:has_contribution ?contribution . ?contribution a pgmrc:empirical_research_practice_contribution . ?contribution pgmr:venue_serie ?venue . ?venue rdfs:label ?venueName . ?contribution pgmr:data_analysis ?dataAnalysis . ?dataAnalysis pgmr:inferential_statistics ?inferentialStatistics . ?inferentialStatistics pgmr:hypothesis ?hypothesis . FILTER(LCASE(STR(?venueName)) = LCASE("IEEE International Requirements Engineering Conference")) FILTER(LCASE(STR(?hypothesis)) IN ("true", "yes", "1")) }
results.pgmr_restored_query: SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?paper) AS ?count) WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C27001 . ?contribution orkgp:P135046 ?venue . ?venue rdfs:label ?venueName . ?contribution orkgp:P15124 ?dataAnalysis . ?dataAnalysis orkgp:P56043 ?inferentialStatistics . ?inferentialStatistics orkgp:P30001 ?hypothesis . FILTER(LCASE(STR(?venueName)) = LCASE("IEEE International Requirements Engineering Conference")) FILTER(LCASE(STR(?hypothesis)) IN ("true", "yes", "1")) }

query_execution.query_with_prefixes:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?paper) AS ?count) WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C27001 . ?contribution orkgp:P135046 ?venue . ?venue rdfs:label ?venueName . ?contribution orkgp:P15124 ?dataAnalysis . ?dataAnalysis orkgp:P56043 ?inferentialStatistics . ?inferentialStatistics orkgp:P30001 ?hypothesis . FILTER(LCASE(STR(?venueName)) = LCASE("IEEE International Requirements Engineering Conference")) FILTER(LCASE(STR(?hypothesis)) IN ("true", "yes", "1")) }

gold_execution.query_with_prefixes:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>

SELECT ?paper ?paperLabel (COUNT(DISTINCT ?hypothesis) AS ?number_of_reported_hypotheses)
WHERE {

    ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .

    OPTIONAL { ?paper rdfs:label ?paperLabel . }

    ?contribution a orkgc:C27001 ;
                  orkgp:P135046 ?venue ;
                  orkgp:P15124 ?data_analysis .

    ?venue rdfs:label ?venue_name .

    ?data_analysis rdfs:label ?da_label ;
                   orkgp:P56043 ?inferential_statistics .

    ?inferential_statistics orkgp:P30001 ?hypothesis .

    FILTER(?da_label != "no analysis"^^xsd:string)
    FILTER(?venue_name = "IEEE International Requirements Engineering Conference"^^xsd:string)
}
GROUP BY ?paper ?paperLabel
ORDER BY DESC(?number_of_reported_hypotheses) ?paperLabel

SELECT ?researchParadigm ?researchParadigmLabel WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C27001 . ?contribution orkgp:P135046 ?venue . ?venue rdfs:label ?venueName . ?contribution orkgp:P15124 ?dataAnalysis . ?dataAnalysis orkgp:P56043 ?inferentialStatistics . ?inferentialStatistics orkgp:P57003 ?researchParadigm . ?researchParadigm rdfs:label ?researchParadigmLabel . gold_execution.query_with_prefixes:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>

SELECT ?research_paradigm ?research_paradigmLabel (COUNT(DISTINCT ?paper) AS ?paper_count)
WHERE {

    ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .

    ?contribution a orkgc:C27001 ;
                  orkgp:P135046 ?venue ;
                  orkgp:P57003 ?research_paradigm .

    ?venue rdfs:label ?venue_name .
    ?research_paradigm rdfs:label ?research_paradigmLabel .

    FILTER(?venue_name = "IEEE International Requirements Engineering Conference"^^xsd:string)
}
GROUP BY ?research_paradigm ?research_paradigmLabel
ORDER BY DESC(?paper_count)

gold_execution.query_with_prefixes:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>

SELECT ?question_type ?question_typeLabel (COUNT(DISTINCT ?paper) AS ?paper_count)
WHERE {
    ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .

    ?contribution a orkgc:C27001 ;
                  orkgp:P135046 ?venue ;
                  orkgp:P37330 ?research_question .

    ?venue rdfs:label ?venue_name .

    ?research_question orkgp:P41928 ?question_type .

    OPTIONAL { ?question_type rdfs:label ?question_typeLabel . }
    FILTER(LCASE(STR(?question_typeLabel)) != LCASE(STR("no type"^^xsd:string)))

    FILTER(?venue_name = "IEEE International Requirements Engineering Conference"^^xsd:string)
}
GROUP BY ?question_type ?question_typeLabel
ORDER BY DESC(?paper_count)

results.question: How is the reporting of machine learning algorithms distributed across decades?
results.raw_model_output: SELECT ?decade ?algorithm ?algorithmLabel WHERE  ?paper pgmr:has_contribution ?contribution . ?contribution a pgmrc:empirical_research_practice_contribution . ?contribution pgmr:venue_serie ?venue . ?venue rdfs:label ?venueName . FILTER(LCASE(STR(?venueName)) = LCASE("IEEE International Requirements Engineering Conference")) ?contribution pgmr:data_analysis ?dataAnalysis . ?dataAnalysis pgmr:machine_learning ?machineLearning . ?machineLearning pgmr:algorithm ?algorithm . ?algorithm rdfs:label ?algorithmLabel . FILTER(LCASE(STR(?venueName)) = LCASE("IEEE International Requirements Engineering Conference"))  ORDER BY ?decade

FILTER(LCASE(STR(?venueName)) = LCASE("IEEE International Requirements Engineering Conference")) } ORDER BY ?decade

PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>

SELECT ?decade ?ml_algorithm ?ml_algorithmLabel (COUNT(DISTINCT ?paper) AS ?paper_count)
WHERE {
    ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution ;
           orkgp:P29 ?year .

    ?contribution a orkgc:C27001 ;
                  orkgp:P135046 ?venue ;
                  orkgp:P15124 ?data_analysis .

    ?venue rdfs:label ?venue_name .

    ?data_analysis rdfs:label ?da_label ;
                   orkgp:P57016 ?machine_learning .

    ?machine_learning orkgp:P2001 ?ml_algorithm .

    OPTIONAL { ?ml_algorithm rdfs:label ?ml_algorithmLabel . }

    BIND(xsd:integer(FLOOR(xsd:decimal(?year) / 10)) * 10 AS ?decade_start)
    BIND(CONCAT(STR(?decade_start), "s") AS ?decade)

    FILTER(?da_label != "no analysis"^^xsd:string)
    FILTER(?venue_name = "IEEE International Requirements Engineering Conference"^^xsd:string)
}
GROUP BY ?decade ?ml_algorithm ?ml_algorithmLabel
ORDER BY ?decade DESC(?paper_count) ?ml_algorithmLabel
